overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character wading through a shallow mountain lake surrounded by dense pine forest, then exiting onto the shore and approaching a wilderness campsite with a covered wagon.

agents.ego_description: wading through shallow water along the lakeshore, moving toward a large rock formation

entered.detail: wooden canoe beached on the right shore of the lake
large gray boulder formation on the left shoreline
dense evergreen pine trees surrounding the lake basin
clear shallow water with visible rocky bottom

segments.scene_description: The character walks through shallow lake water near the shore. A wooden canoe rests on the right bank while a large rock formation looms on the left, with dense pine forest surrounding the area.

scene_state.functional_zone: open lake water approaching far shore

events.description: character passes the large rock formation on the left and continues into deeper open water

agents.ego_description: continuing to wade through open water toward the opposite shore of the lake

entered.detail: sandy beach and tree line on the opposite side of the lake

segments.scene_description: Having passed the rock formation and left the canoe behind, the character continues through open water toward the distant shoreline. The view opens up to show the far bank of the lake.

events.description: character exits the water and steps onto the sandy shore
campsite with covered wagon and beached boat comes into view on the shore

agents.ego_description: exiting the lake onto the sandy shore and approaching a wilderness campsite

entered.detail: sandy beach at the water's edge transitioning to grass
covered wagon with white canvas top at the campsite
small wooden boat or canoe pulled up on the shore

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from water to land, stepping onto the sandy shore. A campsite with a covered wagon and beached boat comes into view as the character approaches the tree line.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest campsite with wagon and campfire

agents.ego_description: walking toward the campsite with the covered wagon and rising campfire smoke

entered.detail: white smoke rising from a campfire at the campsite
canvas tent structure next to the wagon

segments.scene_description: Now on solid ground walking through grass, the character approaches the campsite. The covered wagon is prominent on the left with smoke rising from a nearby campfire, while the lake recedes into the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a character wades through a mountain lake and transitions onto a wilderness shoreline. It begins in shallow water near a wooden canoe and a looming rock formation, surrounded by a dense pine forest. As the character moves past these landmarks, the view opens up across the water toward the distant bank. The scene then shifts as the character steps from the lake onto the sandy shore, bringing a campsite with a covered wagon and a beached boat into view. Finally, the camera follows the character through the grass toward the campsite, where smoke rises from a campfire while the lake recedes into the background.
